audio_clips.text: KINOCHECK
Nighttime city street bustles with a crowd and flashing police lights; Peter Parker stands in the middle of the street, looking around.
Peter weaves through the thickening crowd, his pace quickening, movements growing more urgent as he searches.
Peter rushes to injured Uncle Ben, kneels beside him.
Uncle Ben lies still, eyes closed, head back. His eyes slowly open.
Uncle Ben lies injured on the ground. Peter kneels, holds his hand. Uncle Ben breathes heavily.
Uncle Ben's hands are gently held, then slip away, signifying his passing.
Peter cries, his expression changed from grief to determination. Uncle Ben's face, eyes closed
A dark alley with smoke and debris. Peter, in Spider-Man's suit, sprints through the alley, leaps onto a wall, and scales it with agility. The camera tracks his swift climb.

Spider-Man swings through the night, fluidly navigating the city's skyscrapers. The camera tracks his ascent, revealing the urban expanse below, lit by streetlights and windows. He pauses atop a dome, gazing over the bustling streets with a determined stance.
The camera pans down to show a busy street filled with cars and trucks moving through the rain.
Spider-Man's face is shown up close, eyes focused and determined as he navigates the urban landscape.
Spider-Man swings, web-shooting between tall buildings.

The camera tracks Spider-Man as he agilely swings through the illuminated city, showcasing bustling traffic and vibrant neon signs below. Transitioning to street level, pedestrians navigate past lively shops and eateries.
Hands grip the wheel, navigating rain-slicked streets under neon. Spider-Man, web-shooters ready, swings between skyscrapers, showcasing agility.
Spider-Man into view from the left side, leaps on a yellow car, punches through the roof, and grabs the startled driver.
"Man inside vehicle aims gun from car. Spider-Man swings, lands on truck; driver swerves. Spidey leaps, lands on car."

Spider-Man swings past the Carlsberg beer truck, avoids collision. Neon-lit streets wet pavement below. Spider-Man lands on the truck again, using it as a springboard to propel himself to land on a taxi. Spider-Man punches through the car's windshield
Car crashes through barricade. Spider-Man emerges in rain, eyes glowing. Police arrive, lights flash.
"Dark, messy warehouse."
A man cautiously moves through the shadows, holding a gun. Hearing a noise above, he aims upwards, his face a mix of fear and determination.
Suddenly, a figure hangs upside down from the ceiling, shocking the man with the gun.
A man smashes head through a broken window. Spider-Man fights thug, throws him into crates, disarms, sends flying. Knife in beam.
"Dark room, white-haired man slammed against a wall."
Spider-Man, enraged, grabs the white-haired man.
Peter Parker's face is illuminated by a blue light, his eyes wide with shock and realization.
Scene shifts to black and white, a man with white hair and a mask runs down hallway, pursued by several others in suits.
The white-haired man peeks through a gap. Closed-up shot of Uncle Ben's face.
Peter's face filled with shock. Man with white hair holds a gun pointed at Peter.
Peter grabs the attacker's wrist, forcing the gun to drop.
Peter hurls the attacker into a pipe, debris flies, then the attacker falls through the window.
A police boat patrols the waterways, its lights flashing.
Police officers with flashlights move cautiously through a dim industrial space, inspecting the ceiling and peering through a broken window, their beams cutting through the darkness.
